name: bandit.extortion_first_demand_pay_mcw
description: Bandit shakedown/toll-control regression: resume the McWilliams/Basecamp local-contact fixture, prove the bandit-only pay/fight demand surface, choose pay, and require same-run branch logging plus saved no-active-group writeback.

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the McWilliams bandit local-contact fixture before toll-control proof begins; this is startup/load footing only

steps.label: advance_299_turns_to_gate_edge
steps.expected_immediate_state: bounded turn advance reaches the shakedown gate edge; proof is deferred to the same-run demand-surface artifact after the final turn

steps.label: advance_final_turn_to_first_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: Bandit shakedown dialogue window is visible with the basecamp-pressure opening and player-facing pay/fight/refuse choices after the final local-contact turn

steps.label: audit_first_demand_surface_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the bandit camp-style local gate and pay/fight shakedown surface with reachable goods and demanded toll
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names camp_style profile, open_shakedown posture, reachable goods, demanded toll, and both pay/fight options

steps.label: choose_pay
steps.expected_visible_fact: pay branch was selected from the visible bandit shakedown dialogue; immediate screen should return to gameplay rather than hostile-forward fight selection

steps.label: audit_pay_branch_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the selected pay branch for the first bandit shakedown
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names the pay branch and preserves surrendered/demanded/reachable values (surrendered value may round up to whole surrendered items)

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after choosing the shakedown pay branch

steps.label: confirm_save_quit
steps.expected_immediate_state: uppercase-Y save confirmation should write the paid shakedown state; proof is deferred to saved bandit_live_world audit

steps.label: audit_saved_pay_writeback
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world state did not show all bandits home and no active outside/contact group after paying the toll
steps.expected_immediate_state: after pay/save, saved bandit_live_world has all 14 members ready at home and no active outside group

evidence_contract.claim: ordinary bandit local contact reaches a player-visible pay/fight shakedown surface and the pay branch is recorded as a distinct same-run outcome with saved no-active-group writeback
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for shakedown behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No shakedown/toll-control pay credit unless startup/load, visible demand surface, same-run camp_style/open_shakedown artifact, same-run pay branch artifact, save/writeback, and saved no-active-group state are all green/matched.
